idea.title: Lily Frog
idea.hook: Hop a frog across sinking lilypads to reach the golden fly before every pad goes under.
idea.hook_ru: Допрыгай лягушкой по тонущим кувшинкам до золотой мухи, пока пруд не поглотил всё.
idea.prototype: Top-down 9x9 pond. Frog hops 1-2 tiles N/E/S/W per turn (click adjacent pad). Each pad has sink level 0-3; every player turn, every pad's sink level +1. Pads at level 3 are submerged. Goal: reach gold-fly tile. Daily seed. Score = fewest hops. Touch + click.
idea.mutation_of: Frogger crossed with Threes/Sokoban: turn-based pathfinding under physical-decay pressure on a daily-seeded board.
idea.why_novel: No HTML5 portal currently combines a daily-seeded frogger with sink-per-turn pressure — the per-hop sink is a non-timer pressure axis (turn-based rising water) that gives the player thinking time but punishes route-greed.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Sinking pads — every player hop advances global sink by +1 across the entire 9x9 board; player can think indefinitely between hops.
idea.lose_condition: Frog ends a turn on a level-3 (submerged) pad OR no adjacent pad in 1-2 tiles N/E/S/W is below MAX_SINK.

sources.title: Daily digest 2026-05-09
sources.snippet: Hop a frog across sinking lilypads to reach the golden fly before every pad goes under.

synthesizer_brief: Picked as idea #1 from the 2026-05-09 daily Telegram digest by the multi-agent factory leader; matches the casual / puzzle / daily-seed pattern that performs well on game-factory.tech.
